description_long: This is a medium-sized bubble tea cup featuring a gradient of green matcha tea blending into creamy white milk, with a cluster of black tapioca pearls settled at the bottom. The cup is topped with a flat, light green plastic lid that has a central opening for a wide, light pink straw, which is inserted at an angle. A prominent red and white vertical logo or branding is printed on the front of the cup, adding a commercial touch. The cup appears to be made of translucent plastic, allowing the layered drink and pearls to be visible from the outside. The surface of the cup is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of disposable beverage containers. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, food stalls, or city sidewalks.
description: A translucent plastic bubble tea cup with a green-to-white gradient drink, black tapioca pearls, a flat lid, a wide pink straw, and a red vertical logo on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red vertical logo, green-to-white drink gradient, black tapioca pearls, and the pink straw inserted through the flat lid.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible logo, displaying the smooth gradient and the straw angled toward the back.
description_view_2: Side view with the logo partially visible on the lid, showing the drink's gradient and the straw's position.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the logo only visible on the lid, highlighting the cup's smooth surface and the straw's angle.
attribute_straw_type: wide plastic straw, light pink, straight, inserted at an angle, typical for bubble tea
attribute_cup_lid_style: flat plastic lid with a central straw slot
attribute_cup_branding_or_logo: vertical red and white logo printed on the front of the cup
